mentions.note: Raj Subramaniam has done a fantastic job; calls it a winner.
Named as the preferred logistics name over Radiant Logistics.
Up 10% following ISM manufacturing report strongest since 2022; transport sector rallies directly on economic activity strength.
Industrial/logistics diversification option; e-commerce beneficiary; defensive vs tech volatility.
CEO Raj Hubberman hero status deserved; extraordinary service improvements while slashing billions in costs—analyst meeting explosive.
Logistics company moving things; real business; on Cramer's list of understandable, in-demand companies.
Exceptional Q3: revenue $24B (+8% YoY), EPS $5.25 vs. $4.15. FY26 guidance raised; trades 16x FY27E, 13x 2029E. Freight spin-off (June) unlocks value. Stock deserves higher, maybe appreciably higher.
Winner in logistics space; Raj Subramaniam doing remarkable job; preferred over UPS for growth.

Turnaround story: $5B cost reduction complete, GenAI driving tariff expertise and density optimization, growing demand while reducing capacity. Added 29K US jobs; targeting $80B premium air freight market.
Parent FedEx still favored over pure Freight play; spinoff coverage upcoming for Investing Club; transition management key
Lower fuel costs and e-commerce tailwinds; CEO Raj Supermanian running juggernaut now after late Fred Smith; winning against UPS in trenches. Buy and put it away for long haul.
